case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION:$590.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER, CLAIMANT IS ORDERED TO SERVE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES, AND PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMANDS FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS. PETITIONER IS ALSO ORDERED TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMANDS FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. ERNST HALPERIN, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Petitioner PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Order Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is Granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Anthony Schoenberg; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Mtn To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Docs
Off Calendar Sep-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling: Petitioner PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion to Compel Answers to Petitioner's First Set of Demand for Production and Inspection of Documents is Granted, no opposition. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Charles O. Geerhart; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Answers To First Set Of Demand For Production Of Documents; First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel Answers To First Set Of Demand For Production Of Documents; First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is GRANTED. Within 30 days of notice of entry of this order, Claimant is ordered to serve complete verified responses, without objection, to Petitioner's First Set of Special Interrogatories, Petitioner's First Set of Judicial Council Form Interrogatories, and Petitioner's First Set of Demands for Production and Inspection of Documents. Petitioner is also ordered to produce documents responsive to Petitioner's First Set of Demands for Production and Inspection of Documents within 30 days of notice of entry of this order. Order signed. Ernst Halperin, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
